subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance and art present before the Throne! Hearken unto the Call of God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه و الحاضر امام العرش اسمع ندآء الله المهیمن القیوم در
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
